mapper.insert: insert into notice_tbl values ( notice_seq.nextval, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, sysdate, 0, #{noticePublic}, #{noticeFixed} )
mapper.select: select notice_no, notice_fixed, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date from notice_tbl order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc

select (select count(*) from member_tbl1) as totalMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as thisMonthMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), -1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as lastMonthMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as todayMember, (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate - 1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as yesterdayMember, (select count(case when report_category = '광고' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as ad, (select count(case when report_category = '욕설' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as hate, (select count(case when report_category = '스팸' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as spam, (select count(case when report_category = '기타' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as etc from dual
